articles.title: Ex-Sotheby’s CEO Tad Smith Banks on NFTs, Agrees to Buy Collectibles Platform Candy Digital
articles.summary: The deal has not closed, but Smith announced on X that he would serve as CEO.

articles.title: Manhattan D.A.’s Office Returns 17 Stolen Antiquities and Rare Books to Italy
articles.summary: The recovered items were formally returned in a ceremony held this week

articles.title: Long-Lost Skeleton of D’Artagnan, the Fourth Musketeer, Discovered in Dutch Church
articles.summary: The remains, along with a musket ball and a 17th-century French coin, were found under the floor of a church in Maastricht.
